info.title: Babson Library Student Worker Scheduler
info.description:
Constraint-aware scheduling system for Babson Library student workers.

    Uses Google OR-Tools CP-SAT for optimization-based schedule generation.
    Designed for IBM Orchestrate integration via OpenAPI custom extension.

schema.title: Response List Students Api V1 Students  Get
Response Deactivate Student Api V1 Students  Student Id  Delete
Response Submit Availability Api V1 Availability  Post
Response List Availability Api V1 Availability  Get
Response Get Heatmap Api V1 Availability Heatmap  Week Start Date  Get
Response Import Availability Api V1 Availability Import Post
Response List Templates Api V1 Shifts Templates Get
Response Deactivate Template Api V1 Shifts Templates  Template Id  Delete
Response Generate Instances Api V1 Shifts Instances Generate Post
Response List Instances Api V1 Shifts Instances Get
Response Seed Templates Api V1 Shifts Seed Templates Post
Response List Runs Api V1 Schedules  Get
Response Get Assignments Api V1 Schedules  Run Id  Assignments Get
Response Get Student Summaries Api V1 Schedules  Run Id  Student Summaries Get
Response Patch Assignment Api V1 Schedules  Run Id  Assignments  Assignment Id  Patch
Response Lock Assignment Api V1 Schedules  Run Id  Assignments  Assignment Id  Lock Post
Response Unlock Assignment Api V1 Schedules  Run Id  Assignments  Assignment Id  Lock Delete
Response Run Preflight Check Api V1 Diagnostics Preflight Post
Response Get Violations Api V1 Violations  Run Id  Get

get.description:
Shorthand for ?severity=hard.
IBM Orchestrate branch condition: empty list = safe to publish.

schema.title: Response Get Hard Violations Api V1 Violations  Run Id  Hard Get

reason_codes.title: Reason Codes
reason_codes.description: Explains why this assignment was made

student_id.title: Student Id
student_id.description: New student UUID, or null to clear

shift_instance_id.title: Shift Instance Id
shift_instance_id.description: Preferred: link directly to shift_instance. Provide this OR (day_of_week + times).

slots.title: Slots
slots.description: All availability slots. Atomically replaces any previous submission for this student+week.

is_feasible.title: Is Feasible
is_feasible.description: False if any hard diagnostic findings exist

force_regenerate.title: Force Regenerate
force_regenerate.description: Overwrite existing draft. Blocked if run has locked assignments (returns 409).

slots_per_window.title: Slots Per Window
slots_per_window.description: Concurrent desk positions per time window (default 2)

force.title: Force
force.description: Delete and regenerate if instances already exist

seniority_date.title: Seniority Date
seniority_date.description: Employment start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Earlier = higher seniority.

target_hours.title: Target Hours
target_hours.description: Student's preferred weekly hours target (midpoint of their stated band)
